title: I built a Pokémon-styled multi-agent dashboard to manage all Claude Code sessions
summary: I built a Pokémon-styled multi-agent dashboard to manage all Claude Code sessions
whyItMatters: Like many others here, I got frustrated with managing all my different claude/codex sessions, so i built Pokegents, which is an open source multi-agent workspace for coding agents.
